params.name: Memory Eliminator
params.description: Memory eliminator, similar in appearance to a flashlight or camera, can erase human memory. The working principle of a memory eliminator is to emit a flash of light. When this flash hits the target's eyes, it triggers a specific neural response in the brain, erasing the target's most recent memory. This process is almost instantaneous, and individuals whose memories have been erased will not realize that their memories have been tampered with.
